issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for webhook processing and subscription management.

scenarios.name: Webhook handler for subscription lifecycle
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses @paddle/paddle-node-sdk with paddle.webhooks.unmarshal(body, secret, signature) verifying paddle-signature header and switching on subscription.created / subscription.canceled / transaction.completed; baseline did manual HMAC and missed the SDK unmarshal contract.

scenarios.name: Overlay checkout with customer + customData
scenarios.rationale: Treatment loads cdn.paddle.com/paddle/v2/paddle.js, calls Paddle.Initialize({token}) then Paddle.Checkout.open with items[].priceId, customer.email, and customData.userId for webhook reconciliation; baseline used Stripe-style sessions or a vague redirect without customData linkage.
